'''''Assassin''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].

==History==
During the [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation of]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], it arrived at a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] line used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. However, it was too late to make effective use of this since most of the important Alliance ships had already jumped away into hyperspace.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
